text.title: GDPR DSAR Runbook — Product Dev Team Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply gdpr-dsar-runbook-product-dev-team. Each step names its input, action, and output. Steps may not be reordered without explicit deviation note.

step.name: Intake
step.description: Input: Subject request. Action: Log; assign DSAR ID; ack within 72h.. Output: DSAR ticket..

step.name: Verify identity
step.description: Input: DSAR ticket. Action: Verify per redaction policy; reject if weak.. Output: Verified subject..

step.name: Orchestrate extraction
step.description: Input: Verified subject + data map. Action: Run per-system extracts.. Output: Raw bundle..
step.note: Step 3. Required input: Verified subject + data map.

step.name: Redact
step.description: Input: Raw bundle. Action: Apply redaction policy; second-pair review.. Output: Redacted bundle..

step.name: Deliver + audit
step.description: Input: Redacted bundle. Action: Deliver to subject; write audit entry; close ticket.. Output: Delivered DSAR + audit row..
